name: super-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap is the public entry — gates greenfield (lean ideation Q&A → overview/techstack/backlog seed), then dispatches to /super-bootstrap:harness-bootstrap which scaffolds CLAUDE.md, skeleton docs, path-scoped rules, and curated skill/MCP/hook picks. Bundles /super-bootstrap:commit (session-isolated, doc-sync-gated), /super-bootstrap:todo (default-full board; sub-verbs /super-bootstrap:todo discuss · cloud · device opt-in slice when board grows past 5 rows), /super-bootstrap:help (user-invoke skill discovery surface), /super-bootstrap:merge (branch absorption with per-branch rebase-vs-merge recommendation; aborts + surfaces on conflict), and /super-bootstrap:release-init (optional one-shot — detects project type, generates a tailored project-level /release skill). All bundled skills namespaced under super-bootstrap: except the entry — see plugin README for naming convention. Solo dev workflow.
